mapper.insert: INSERT INTO registration (user_id, event_id, real_name, id_card, shirt_size, emergency_contact, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{eventId}, #{realName}, #{idCard}, #{shirtSize}, #{emergencyContact}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE registration SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, e.name AS event_name FROM registration r LEFT JOIN event e ON r.event_id = e.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.apply_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM registration WHERE event_id = #{eventId} AND status = 1
